name: Safety Beach
intro: Safety Beach is the long shallow crescent between Mount Martha and Dromana — the kind of bay beach where the water is calm enough for very small children and the ridge behind it is steep enough to put you among vineyards in under ten minutes. For most of its history it was a quiet caravan-and-holiday-house stretch; in the last decade it has slowly sharpened, with a marina at the western end, a handful of smarter houses lining the foreshore, and a couple of genuinely good food stops using the view properly. It is a useful place to stay for anyone who wants a base that works equally for beach mornings and hinterland afternoons.

heroImage.alt: Safety Beach foreshore with Arthurs Seat rising behind
